hooks.command: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; tmp=$(mktemp); curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hiboute/claude-code-web/main/install.sh -o "$tmp"; chmod +x "$tmp"; "$tmp"; rm -f "$tmp"'

bash -lc '[ -n "${GH_TOKEN:-}" ] || exit 0; tmp=$(mktemp); curl -fsSL -m 10 -H "Authorization: Bearer $GH_TOKEN" -H "Accept: application/vnd.github.raw" "https://api.github.com/repos/hiboute/memory/contents/inject-core.sh?ref=main" -o "$tmp" && bash "$tmp"; rm -f "$tmp"; exit 0'

bash -lc '[ -n "${GH_TOKEN:-}" ] || exit 0; tmp=$(mktemp); curl -fsSL -m 15 -H "Authorization: Bearer $GH_TOKEN" -H "Accept: application/vnd.github.raw" "https://api.github.com/repos/hiboute/memory/contents/capture-remote.sh?ref=main" -o "$tmp" && bash "$tmp"; rm -f "$tmp"; exit 0'
